name: ChatGPT
description: ChatGPT is an advanced AI chatbot developed by OpenAI that helps users generate content, answer questions and automate tasks using natural language.

name: Claude
description: Claude is an AI assistant created by Anthropic designed for safe and helpful conversations, writing, coding and research.

name: Gemini
description: Gemini is Google's AI assistant that helps users with writing, research, coding and productivity tasks.

name: Perplexity AI
description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered search engine that provides accurate answers with real-time sources.

name: Poe
description: Poe is an AI chat platform that allows users to interact with multiple AI models in one interface.

name: Midjourney
description: Midjourney is one of the most popular AI image generators that creates artistic and photorealistic images from text prompts.

name: DALL-E
description: DALL-E is an AI image generation model developed by OpenAI that can create detailed images from text descriptions.

name: Leonardo AI
description: Leonardo AI is a powerful AI image generator used for creating game assets, illustrations and artwork.

name: Ideogram
description: Ideogram is an AI image generator known for generating images with high quality typography and text rendering.

name: Playground AI
description: Playground AI allows users to generate and edit images using powerful AI models.

name: Runway
description: Runway is an AI video generation platform used for creating and editing videos with artificial intelligence.

name: Pika
description: Pika is an AI video generator that allows users to create cinematic videos from text prompts.

name: Synthesia
description: Synthesia is an AI video creation platform that generates videos with realistic AI avatars.

name: HeyGen
description: HeyGen helps users create AI avatar videos for marketing, training and social media.

name: InVideo AI
description: InVideo AI is an AI video generator designed for marketers and content creators.

name: Jasper AI
description: Jasper AI is an AI writing assistant used by marketers to generate blog posts, ads and marketing copy.

name: Copy AI
description: Copy AI is an AI writing platform that helps generate marketing content, emails and product descriptions.

name: Writesonic
description: Writesonic is an AI content generator designed for SEO articles and marketing copy.

name: Rytr
description: Rytr is an affordable AI writing assistant that helps generate content quickly.

name: Anyword
description: Anyword is an AI writing platform that optimizes marketing copy using predictive performance scoring.

name: Notion AI
description: Notion AI enhances productivity by helping users write, summarize and organize information.

name: Taskade
description: Taskade is an AI productivity platform for task management and team collaboration.

name: Otter AI
description: Otter AI automatically transcribes meetings and conversations using AI.

name: Fireflies AI
description: Fireflies AI records and transcribes meetings while providing searchable notes.

name: Mem AI
description: Mem AI is an intelligent note taking tool that organizes information automatically.
